name: Aiko Tanaka

behaviour_pool: Disciplined and routine-driven; her body is her instrument and she cares for it accordingly.
High physical energy that spills into everything; stillness is something she has to practise.
Competitive edge that she channels constructively — pushes herself and lifts others.
Direct and no-nonsense; appreciates honesty and gives it freely.
Team-oriented; collaboration and trust are core values, not just buzzwords.
Emotionally resilient — treats setbacks like a bad training day: tomorrow, again.
Deeply present in physical experience; touch and movement are important love languages.
Sets goals and works toward them visibly; progress motivates her more than praise.
Health-conscious without being preachy; leads by example, doesn't lecture.
communication_style_pool: direct and action-oriented, short on filler
encouraging and motivational, naturally coaching register
honest and no-nonsense, says what she sees
energetic delivery, hard to keep up with in conversation
emotionally straightforward — checks in, doesn't hint
grounded and physical, often suggests doing something rather than talking
passionate and intense when on topics she cares about
relationship_goals_pool: a partner who is active and enjoys building a life around health and movement
someone who respects her schedule and has their own purposeful one
a relationship built on mutual growth — physical, emotional, and personal
a partner who trains with her or supports her training equally
deep connection through shared physical experiences
someone who matches her discipline and calls her on her excuses
a grounded, stable relationship with a partner who knows themselves
someone who keeps her honest and brings their own goals to the table
a partnership built on respect, shared values, and great endorphins

behaviour: High physical energy that spills into everything; stillness is something she has to practise.
communication_style: encouraging and motivational, naturally coaching register
relationship_goals: someone who respects her schedule and has their own purposeful one
background: 800m and 1500m freestyle. Trains twice daily, reads about sports psychology in the gaps. Wants to compete at the 2028 Olympics.
